# Source Code Header Templates

Use these header templates for new source code files in the Zopio project.

## TypeScript/JavaScript Files

```typescript
/**
 * Copyright (c) 2024 Zopio Inc.
 * 
 * This file is part of Zopio.
 * 
 * Zopio is licensed under the Business Source License 1.1 (BSL).
 * You may use this source code for development and testing purposes.
 * Production use requires a commercial license from Zopio Inc.
 * 
 * See LICENSE file in the project root for full license details.
 * For commercial licensing, contact: legal@zopio.com
 */
```

## CSS/SCSS Files

```css
/*
 * Copyright (c) 2024 Zopio Inc.
 * 
 * This file is part of Zopio.
 * Licensed under the Business Source License 1.1 (BSL).
 * See LICENSE file in the project root for full license details.
 */
```

## HTML Files

```html
<!--
  Copyright (c) 2024 Zopio Inc.
  
  This file is part of Zopio.
  Licensed under the Business Source License 1.1 (BSL).
  See LICENSE file in the project root for full license details.
-->
```

## Marketplace Plugin Template

For marketplace plugins, use MIT licensing:

```typescript
/**
 * Copyright (c) 2024 [Your Name/Organization]
 * 
 * This Zopio marketplace plugin is licensed under the MIT License.
 * See marketplace/LICENSE file for full license details.
 */
```

## Usage Guidelines

- **Core Framework Files**: Use BSL header template
- **Marketplace Plugins**: Use MIT header template  
- **Update Copyright Year**: Use current year when creating new files
- **Commercial Licensing**: Direct inquiries to legal@zopio.com
